templateAnalysis.promptInstruction: Product editorial studio shot. A single product pouch or canister centered vertically on a minimal flat surface. Background is a smooth vertical gradient from soft sage green or muted brand color at the top, fading to near-white or light cream at the bottom. Product sits directly on the surface with a soft, realistic drop shadow beneath it. Studio lighting is soft, even, and diffused from slightly above — no harsh highlights or directional shadows. The product label should face forward and be fully legible. No lifestyle props, no people, no background elements. Camera angle is straight-on at slight downward tilt, approximately eye-level to product. Colour palette should mirror the brand's primary color on the label against the sage/neutral gradient. The overall mood is clean, premium, natural, and trustworthy. Composition leaves generous negative space at top (40% of frame) for large headline text overlay, and clear empty space at bottom (20% of frame) for CTA button and star rating. Product occupies the center 40% of the frame.

concept.headline:
The Cleanest
Coffee Alternative
concept.primary_text: 100% organic Tulsi & green tea — no jitters, no crash, no compromise.
concept.visual_description: A single Organica Tulsi Green Tea box is centered on a smooth off-white surface, casting a soft natural drop shadow beneath it. The background transitions seamlessly from a calming sage green at the top to a warm near-white cream at the bottom, creating a clean gradient that frames the product. Studio lighting is soft and even, illuminating the packaging's lime-green label accents and fine typography with crisp, premium clarity.

prompts.claude:
Facebook/Instagram ad, editorial photography style. A single Organica Tulsi Green Tea box centered on a smooth matte off-white surface, positioned precisely within the center vertical band of a 4:5 frame, occupying the middle 43% of the frame height — top edge of the box sitting no higher than 32% from the top of the frame, bottom edge sitting no lower than 76% from the top, leaving the upper 32% of the frame and the lower 24% completely clear of all packaging, label, and logo. The box faces directly forward, label fully legible, with crisp lime-green accent detailing and fine premium typography rendered in sharp focus at the product face.

Background is a seamless, smooth vertical gradient: soft sage green — muted, slightly desaturated, calm and botanical — at the very top of the frame, transitioning through a pale eucalyptus mid-tone in the center, dissolving into a warm near-white cream at the bottom surface. The gradient is smooth and continuous with zero banding, zero vignette rings, and zero tonal jumps. The upper sage zone provides a naturally darkened, muted background that creates high contrast for white headline text overlay placed above the product.

The box sits directly on the flat surface with a soft, precise drop shadow beneath it — shadow falls slightly rearward and downward, soft-edged and realistic, blending naturally into the cream surface. No hard shadow lines. No secondary reflections.

Studio lighting is soft, diffused, and even — a large frontal softbox positioned slightly above the camera axis, approximately 15 degrees downward tilt, illuminating the label face with consistent, shadow-free coverage. A subtle secondary fill from camera-right eliminates any deep shadow on the box sides while preserving gentle edge definition and three-dimensional form. Specular highlights on the packaging surface are controlled and matte — no blown-out glossy hotspots. The lime-green label accents catch the soft key light with clean, natural luminosity. The overall tonal range is compressed toward the light and neutral end — no dramatic contrast, no theatrical shadows, no directional chiaroscuro.

Camera angle is straight-on, eye-level to the product, with the slightest downward tilt of approximately 5 to 8 degrees — product fills the center horizontal band of the frame with generous empty sage-green negative space above and clean cream negative space below. No perspective distortion, no wide-angle barrel effect. Lens character is consistent with an 85mm to 100mm medium telephoto — flat, precise, product-forward compression with minimal depth falloff across the box face.

No lifestyle props, no botanicals, no hands, no people, no pouring liquid, no loose tea leaves, no background elements of any kind. The surface is bare, smooth, and uninterrupted except for the single product and its drop shadow. Color palette mirrors the brand's sage green and lime-green label tones against the neutral gradient field. Mood is clean, precise, premium, natural, and trustworthy — a polished editorial product frame with the authority and clarity of a high-end wellness brand campaign. Photorealistic. Ultra high resolution.

Colour palette is white, light grey (marble), earthy cream (packaging), and fresh green (branding accents). Minimal props — product only. Mood is clean, premium, health-conscious, and trustworthy. concept.headline: Ditch The Jitters. Sip This.
concept.primary_text: Save 10% today — your crash-free mornings are one cup away.
concept.visual_description: Organica's Tulsi Green Tea stand-up pouch centered on a pristine white marble surface with soft natural lighting casting a gentle shadow beneath the product. The earthy cream packaging and fresh green branding accents pop cleanly against the cool marble, conveying a premium health-conscious aesthetic. Minimal overhead composition with the entire product in sharp focus — no props, no clutter, just the product.

prompts.claude:
Facebook/Instagram ad, editorial photography style. Flat-lay product photography scene captured from a slight overhead angle, approximately 15 degrees off vertical, looking down onto a pristine white Carrara marble surface with soft natural grey veining running diagonally across the frame. The Organica Tulsi Green Tea stand-up resealable pouch is positioned dead-center in the middle vertical band of the composition, occupying roughly 40–45% of the frame height, sitting upright with the label fully forward-facing and in sharp focus. The product base rests at approximately the 40% mark from the top of the frame, and the top of the pouch reaches no higher than the 32% mark from the top edge, leaving the full upper quarter of the image as clean open marble for text overlay. The bottom 24% of the frame is completely clear — pure white marble surface, no product, no props, nothing crossing into that zone.

The marble surface is immaculate — cool white with hairline grey mineral veins catching the diffused light, a smooth matte finish with microscopic surface grain visible at high resolution. A soft, precise product shadow falls slightly to the lower-right beneath the pouch base, cast from a large diffused natural light source positioned upper-left, approximately 45 degrees. The shadow is soft-edged, cool-toned, and crisp at the base contact point, feathering gently outward.

The earthy cream kraft-tone packaging body of the pouch sits clean and textured against the marble, with the bold green branded lower section of the pouch saturated and vivid, creating a fresh contrast against the neutral marble. The resealable zip closure at the top catches a faint specular highlight from the overhead light. Packaging surface texture — slight matte paper grain, subtle emboss detail, clean print registration — is rendered with macro-level sharpness. No part of the label bleeds, warps, or loses legibility.

The overall mood is bright, clean, and quietly joyful — the lighting is soft and luminous rather than clinical, with a gentle warm-neutral color grade that makes the green branding feel alive and the marble feel cool and premium. The upper-right quadrant of the frame is open, unobstructed, reserved for a circular badge overlay. No hands, no lifestyle elements, no props, no secondary objects, no scatter, no botanicals, no steam, no cups, no surfaces beyond the marble. The scene is completely minimal.

Photorealistic. Ultra high resolution.

template.name: 03_TestimonialCard

templateAnalysis.visualStyle: Casual UGC-style selfie photograph taken indoors in a bright, modern kitchen/home setting. The subject is a mixed-race woman in her 30s wearing a dark athletic tank top with a gold chain necklace, holding up a product bag toward the camera. Natural window light from the right creates warm, authentic lighting with slight skin flush visible. Background is softly blurred with white cabinetry, a water bottle, keys, and a chair with draped clothing visible. Depth of field is shallow, keeping the subject and product sharp while the background remains bokeh. Color palette is neutral whites and grays in the background contrasted with the bold green and white product packaging. Mood is authentic, post-workout, relatable, and trustworthy. Composition is portrait/vertical format with the subject filling the upper two-thirds and a white overlay card anchoring the bottom third.

textZones.typographyStyle: Semi-bold italic serif for quote in dark green, regular sans-serif in gray for attribution, bold white sans-serif on green pill for CTA button, green star icons
textZones.approximateContent: 5 green stars | Quote: 'I switched from whey three months ago. No bloat. No regrets.' | Attribution: 'Verified ECO Protein customer' | CTA button: 'Read More Reviews'
textZones.purpose: Social proof through customer testimonial to build credibility and trust, with CTA to drive click-through to review page

contentRequirements.cta: Rounded pill-shaped button in medium green with bold white sans-serif text, approximately 3-5 words e.g. 'Read More Reviews', centered within the testimonial card
contentRequirements.testimonial: Short punchy first-person quote, 15-25 words, conversational and emotionally resonant, structured as short declarative sentences. Attribution reads 'Verified [Brand] customer' in small gray sans-serif below the quote.
contentRequirements.other: Product packaging must be clearly legible and held up by the subject in a natural hand-raise gesture. White rounded-rectangle card with soft shadow overlays the bottom 35-40% of the image.

templateAnalysis.angleReason: The entire template is built around a verified customer testimonial with star rating and a CTA to read more reviews, making social proof the dominant and most effective angle.

A water bottle, keys, and casual household items are faintly visible in the bokeh background. Shallow depth of field keeps the subject's face and the product packaging sharp. The product packaging is sharp, forward-facing, and clearly legible as she raises it confidently toward the lens.

Her right arm extends forward toward the camera, holding the Organica Tulsi Green Tea packaging firmly upright with her palm and fingers wrapped around the base of the box, the front face of the packaging angled squarely toward the lens. The product color palette — deep greens, clean whites, botanical graphic detail — pops crisply against the warm neutral background. Realistic studio-grade sharpness on the box surface, natural hand grip with visible finger pressure and authentic skin texture.

Keys, a folded cloth, and an indistinct mug — hinting at a lived-in domestic morning — are faintly resolved in shallow bokeh. A coffee mug sits pushed to the back of the counter, slightly obscured, dusty and untouched, visually communicating abandonment without being staged. The coffee maker behind her is switched off, subtly cold in tone.

Natural daylight streams in from a large window on the right side of the frame, casting warm golden-white light across the right side of the woman's face and bare shoulder, creating a soft luminous highlight along her cheekbone and collarbone. The left side of her face falls into gentle, clean shadow — soft and flattering, not dramatic. The window light also catches the surface of the product packaging with a controlled specular highlight along one edge, reinforcing its physical presence. No harsh flash, no ring light artifact, no artificial strobes.

The bottom 28% of the frame is left naturally uncluttered — the composition falls away to soft neutral kitchen tones in shallow focus, no subject elements, no packaging, no hands, clean and visually quiet to accommodate an overlay card in post-production.

prompts.claude:
Facebook/Instagram ad, editorial photography style. Seamless light grey-to-white gradient studio background, smooth and featureless, no corners visible, no texture, transitioning from pale cool grey at the top quarter down to near-white at the center and lower frame. The top 32% of the frame is completely unobstructed — no product, no props, no elements — a calm open gradient zone reserved for headline text overlay, naturally lighter and airy in tone.

The hero product — the Organica Tulsi Green Tea bag, a white and deep-forest-green stand-up pouch with clean premium branding — is placed vertically centered in the middle of the frame, occupying the central vertical band between 35% and 78% from the top. The pouch is angled 5 to 8 degrees clockwise for subtle dynamism, slightly three-quarter turned so the front label faces the camera with full label legibility. The bottom of the pouch sits clearly above the bottom 24% of the frame, leaving the lower strip completely empty and clean for CTA button overlay. No part of the packaging extends into the top 32% or bottom 24% reserved zones.

Surrounding the pouch, organic natural props are scattered asymmetrically across the visible mid-zone surface: two to three fresh tulsi leaves of varied sizes — deep green with visible veining and slightly serrated edges — positioned to the left and lower-right of the pouch, resting flat on the surface. A small loose cluster of tiny raw green seeds and fine granules scattered naturally near the lower-left of the bag's base. Three to four precise circular water droplets rest on the seamless surface near the right side of the pouch — each droplet catching a soft specular pinpoint of studio light, transparent with a crisp edge and a faint lens-like refraction shadow beneath. The central horizontal strip of the frame — the zone flanking the pouch mid-section — remains visually calm and uncluttered, free of prop density, reserved for checklist overlay.

Lighting is soft, even, diffused overhead studio lighting — large softbox directly above, creating smooth gradual shadows beneath the pouch base to ground it on the surface, with zero harsh falloff. A secondary fill source from camera-left at low intensity lifts the left face of the pouch. A faint warm backlight rim traces the right edge of the pouch, separating it cleanly from the background. The tulsi leaves receive crisp edge definition under the overhead diffusion. The water droplets catch a single tight specular highlight each. Overall contrast is bold and graphic — clean white packaging against the pale grey field, deep forest green and lime green packaging accents reading sharply against the neutral ground.

Color palette throughout: crisp white, pale cool grey, fresh lime green and deep forest green drawn directly from the packaging, transparent water droplet geometry, and the natural muted green of the tulsi leaves. Flat depth of field — every element from the pouch face to the scattered leaves and droplets is in sharp focus, no bokeh, no blur falloff. The overall mood is minimal, premium, health-focused, organic, and precisely composed — the authority of a clinically clean studio product editorial

The overall color temperature is clean neutral-to-cool white, reinforcing a clinical premium freshness consistent with botanical wellness branding.

concept.visual_description: A soft two-tone gradient background transitions smoothly from muted sage green on the left to near-white on the right, evoking a calm, natural wellness aesthetic. The Organica Tulsi Green Tea stand-up pouch is positioned on the left half at a gentle outward angle, its earthy kraft-toned packaging crisp and fully legible, casting a soft diffused shadow on the gradient surface below. Studio-quality lighting is even and airy, keeping the entire frame in sharp focus with no harsh shadows — the right half remains open and typographically clean.

prompts.claude:
Facebook/Instagram ad, editorial photography style.

Studio product editorial photograph, split-composition layout, vertical 4:5 format. The Organica Tulsi Green Tea stand-up pouch is placed upright on the LEFT half of the frame — occupying horizontal positions 5% through 48% — centered vertically with a subtle bottom weighting so the base of the pouch sits slightly below the midpoint of the frame. The pouch tilts at a gentle 5-degree outward angle toward the viewer, its kraft-toned earthy packaging fully crisp and label-forward, with every typographic detail, logo mark, and product name in sharp resolved focus. A soft diffused shadow falls directly beneath and slightly to the right of the pouch base, hugging the flat studio surface — no harsh cast, no deep contrast, just a delicate contact shadow that grounds the product with weight and realism.

The background is a seamless two-tone gradient running horizontally across the full frame: deep muted sage green anchors the far-left edge, transitioning through soft olive-sage into pale warm cream, arriving at near-white on the far-right edge. The gradient is smooth, continuous, and painterly — no banding, no visible seam. The flat surface the pouch rests on reflects the same gradient palette, slightly cooler and more neutral, with a faint soft specular sheen suggesting a clean acrylic or matte studio plinth.

The RIGHT half of the frame — from the 50% horizontal center line to the right edge — is entirely clear: a smooth pale cream-to-white gradient field with zero objects, zero clutter, zero texture variation. Soft light spills naturally from the studio source into this zone, keeping it bright, airy, and typographically clean. No product edges cross the vertical centerline.

Lighting is professional lightbox studio quality — a large softbox positioned at upper-left at roughly 40 degrees, producing even, shadowless illumination across the pouch face with gentle highlight definition along the pouch's left shoulder edge and seal strip. A secondary fill card from the right prevents any underexposure on the right half. The entire frame sits in sharp, uniform focus — no depth-of-field blur, no selective softening. Colour temperature is clean daylight-balanced with a very slight warm cream push on the right zone, reinforcing the wellness calm.

Overall mood: trustworthy, natural, premium, unhurried. Sage green to warm white palette. Clean minimalist health and wellness aesthetic. No lifestyle props, no people, no botanicals, no background objects, no decorative elements. Zero text, zero UI elements, zero overlaid graphics painted into the image. The Tulsi Green Tea pouch is the sole subject — fully legible, naturally lit, grounded, and unmistakably the hero of the frame.

Photorealistic. Ultra high resolution.

template.name: 08_BeforeAfterUGC

templateAnalysis.visualStyle: Split-screen before-after UGC-style photo composition. Left panel: dimly lit, slightly desaturated indoor portrait of a woman in a grey t-shirt with hand on stomach, neutral/somber expression, soft diffused home lighting, plain warm-grey background. Right panel: bright, high-energy post-workout gym selfie with flushed cheeks, confident smile, dark athletic tank top, holding a product bag into frame, natural overhead gym lighting, blurred gym equipment background. Overall palette is muted naturals with a pop of green from the product packaging. Authentic, unpolished aesthetic mimicking real user-generated content. Portrait orientation, close-cropped face-and-torso framing on both sides.

textZones.purpose: Labels the left panel to orient the viewer and set up the transformation narrative

textZones.approximateContent: No fillers. No lactose. Just clean water lentil protein.
textZones.purpose: Supports headline by addressing pain points and differentiating the product with clean ingredient positioning

textZones.typographyStyle: bold white text on solid forest-green rounded pill button, medium-large size
textZones.purpose: Drives click-through by reducing purchase friction with risk-free framing

contentRequirements.badge: Two small white pill-shaped labels: 'Before' (upper-left) and 'After' (upper-right), dark text, minimal styling
contentRequirements.headline: Short punchy contrast headline using 'Before [problem]. After [brand].' format. Max 6-8 words. Heavy font, dark green color.
contentRequirements.subheadline: One sentence, 8-12 words, listing 2-3 clean ingredient/benefit claims separated by periods. Regular weight, grey text.
contentRequirements.cta: Short 3-4 word risk-reducing CTA on a solid green rounded pill button. White bold text. e.g. 'Try It Risk-Free'
contentRequirements.other: Product packaging must appear in the 'After' panel, held naturally by the subject toward camera. The after photo should show a flushed, energetic, post-use state to imply product effectiveness.

templateAnalysis.angleReason: The split before-after format is the definitive transformation structure, visually contrasting a negative state (bloat, discomfort) with a positive outcome (energy, confidence) to make the product's benefit immediately tangible.
templateAnalysis.promptInstruction: Split-screen before-and-after UGC-style portrait photograph. Left panel: a woman in her 30s standing indoors in a plain light grey t-shirt, hand resting on her stomach, slightly subdued expression, soft low-contrast home lighting, warm grey blurred background, desaturated muted tones. Right panel: same woman as a gym selfie, post-workout flushed cheeks and bright smile, wearing a dark charcoal athletic tank top, bright natural gym lighting, blurred gym equipment in background, confidently holding a product bag or container up toward the camera so it is clearly visible. White background panel below both images. Small white rounded-rectangle pill badges labelled 'Before' and 'After' in the upper corners of each respective panel. Bottom section has white background with large bold dark forest-green headline text, one line of smaller grey subheadline body text beneath it, and a solid forest-green rounded pill CTA button at the bottom. Overall mood: authentic, real, unfiltered — not studio polished. Vertical portrait orientation 4:5 ratio.

concept.headline: Before Coffee Crashes. After Organica.
concept.primary_text: No jitters. No crash. Just Tulsi, green tea, and real calm energy.
concept.visual_description: Left panel: a woman in a soft grey t-shirt stands in a dim, warmly lit kitchen, hand resting on her stomach, tired and slightly tense expression, muted grey-beige background with an empty coffee mug visible on the counter behind her. Right panel: the same woman in a dark athletic tank top, flushed cheeks and a wide confident smile, holding the Organica Tulsi Green Tea box toward the camera in a bright, airy space with blurred greenery in the background. The overall palette shifts from desaturated and heavy on the left to fresh, luminous, and green-accented on the right, mimicking authentic user-generated content.

prompts.claude:
Facebook/Instagram ad, editorial photography style.

Vertical 4:5 split-screen UGC-style portrait photograph divided cleanly down the center into two equal side-by-side panels, both featuring the same woman in her early-to-mid 30s, light-olive skin, shoulder-length dark brown wavy hair worn loosely down, natural minimal makeup.

LEFT PANEL — "Before" state: The woman stands indoors in a plain soft light grey crew-neck t-shirt, right hand resting gently on her stomach, posture slightly inward and subdued, expression tired and mildly tense — not dramatic, just quietly drained. The kitchen background behind her is blurred with a shallow depth of field: warm grey-beige walls, a soft-focus wooden countertop, and an empty ceramic coffee mug resting on the counter suggesting the tail end of a caffeine routine. Home lighting is dim and low-contrast, coming from a single warm overhead source at roughly 2700K, casting gentle flat shadows with no hard lines. The entire left panel has a desaturated, muted, slightly heavy color grade — warm grey tones pulled toward cool ash, low saturation greens, no luminance lift. The woman's skin tone reads slightly sallow and fatigued under this palette. No product visible in this panel.

RIGHT PANEL — "After" state: The same woman now stands in a bright, airy indoor space with large blurred background windows suggesting soft morning daylight pouring in at 5600K from camera-left. Her expression is fully open — wide confident smile, flushed cheeks, chin slightly lifted, energy radiating naturally. She wears a fitted dark charcoal athletic tank top, hair slightly tousled as if post-movement. Her right arm is raised toward camera, elbow bent, holding the Organica Tulsi Green Tea box firmly and confidently angled so the front label faces the viewer directly. The product is positioned occupying ONLY the center vertical band of the frame, beginning no higher than 35% from the top of the overall composition and ending no lower than 76% from the top — fully clear of the top 32% zone and the bottom 24% zone. The background behind her is blurred lush indoor greenery — soft-focus houseplants and natural light walls creating a fresh, luminous, green-tinted ambient bounce that complements the Organica branding palette. This panel's color grade is lifted, warm, and fresh — soft greens, cream highlights, rosy skin warmth, full saturation restored. The Organica Tulsi Green Tea box receives a clean soft specular highlight from the window light source, label fully readable, no glare, natural perspective tilt of approximately 10 degrees toward camera for dimensionality.

The two panels sit flush against each other with a clean invisible seam or an ultra-thin 2px white dividing line. The bottom 24% of the full frame is a clean flat white background with no photographic content — completely empty, reserved for overlay elements. The top 32% of both panels is similarly kept free of the product, containing only the blurred background environments and upper body of the subject. Overall mood across both panels reads as authentic, real, and unfiltered — handheld UGC energy, not studio-polished, with natural micro-imperfections in focus and organic human warmth. No text. No badges. No UI elements. No arrows. No cards. No labels painted into the image.

Photorealistic. Ultra high resolution.

concept.headline: Your Coffee Replacement Is Here
concept.primary_text: Organica Tulsi Green Tea gives you steady energy — no crash, no anxiety, no regrets.
concept.visual_description: A warm, sunlit kitchen countertop scene with soft morning light streaming through a window. An organica Tulsi Green Tea box and a freshly brewed cup of golden-green tea sit center frame, steam gently rising, surrounded by a few fresh tulsi leaves and a small ceramic honey dish. The mood is calm, clean, and unhurried — the kind of morning ritual that feels like a healthy upgrade.

prompts.claude:
Facebook/Instagram ad, editorial photography style.

A warm sunlit kitchen countertop scene shot at slight eye-level angle, framed in a 4:5 vertical composition with deliberate negative space in the upper third and lower third to accommodate headline and CTA overlays — the product occupies the center-left of the frame as the unmistakable visual hero.

The organica Tulsi Green Tea box stands upright on a clean white marble countertop with soft grey veining, positioned center-left, label facing directly toward camera, fully readable, lit by soft diffused morning window light entering from the upper-left at a 45-degree angle. Beside the box, a handthrown ceramic mug in matte warm cream glaze holds freshly brewed golden-green tea, with a delicate coil of translucent steam rising naturally from the surface and catching the backlit morning glow. The steam thread curves gently upward and dissolves into soft bokeh — rendered with volumetric realism, not illustrated.

Three to four fresh tulsi leaves rest casually on the marble surface beside the mug, slightly overlapping, with vivid deep-green colour, visible leaf veining, and natural waxy sheen. A small round ceramic honey dish in pale off-white sits just behind the mug, a thin amber honey drip visible on its rim. One loose dried tulsi sprig leans gently against the product box, grounding the composition organically.

The marble countertop catches warm golden-cream reflected light from the window, creating a soft luminous surface beneath the product. Behind the scene, a shallow depth of field dissolves the background into a soft blur of warm cream cabinetry, a faint suggestion of a white linen curtain catching morning light, and the ghost of a window frame glowing at the upper-left edge — intimate, domestic, unhurried.

Lighting is entirely soft natural window light from upper-left: warm champagne-gold key light rakes across the product box front creating gentle highlights on the packaging edges, a soft fill from the reflective marble surface below, and a delicate rim of light catching the steam column and tulsi leaves. No harsh shadows. The overall palette is warm white, sage green, honey amber, and soft cream — calm, clean, and deeply trustworthy.

Lens character: 85mm equivalent, f/2.2 shallow depth of field, sharp critical focus on the product box label and mug rim, gradual softness into mid-ground and background. Slight warmth in color grade — lifted shadows, creamy highlights, muted greens, honest skin-tone-adjacent warmth that communicates health and calm.

The upper third of the frame is intentionally open negative space in soft warm cream-white from the blurred background — clean and unobstructed for headline text overlay. The lower third of the countertop surface is clean marble with minimal props — open for CTA placement. The product box and mug fill the center of the frame with clear visual authority: this is the transformation, the morning ritual upgrade, the calm that replaces coffee anxiety — communicated in a single glance.

No faces. No hands. No text painted into the scene. No UI elements. No coffee cups. No coffee beans. No clutter.

Photorealistic. Ultra high resolution.

Directly beside it, slightly forward in frame, a hand-thrown ceramic mug in matte sage green filled with freshly brewed golden-green tulsi tea, translucent and warm-toned, with three to four wisps of delicate steam curling upward into the window light, catching and scattering the backlight into fine luminous threads. Surrounding the hero product — three to four fresh tulsi leaves with slightly waxy surface texture scattered organically on the countertop, one leaf resting against the base of the tea box, catching rim light. A small round off-white ceramic honey dish with a miniature wooden dipper sits at the right edge, slightly out of focus. Upper third of frame is open negative space — soft blurred warm cream kitchen background, shallow depth of field with a 85mm lens character, bokeh resolving into warm amber and sage tones. Lower third holds clean counter surface for CTA overlay. Colour palette: warm cream whites, muted sage greens, golden honey ambers. The steam, the warm liquid colour, and the open morning light communicate immediate comfort and resolution — the "after" state of a peaceful, energised morning ritual replacing the anxiety of coffee. Photorealistic. Ultra high resolution.

template.name: 09_NegativeMarketing

templateAnalysis.visualStyle: Clean studio-style product comparison composition on a near-white/off-white background. The hero product (ECO Protein pouch) is sharp and in full focus in the foreground-right, while a competitor product (large protein tub) is blurred and desaturated/greyed-out in the background-left, creating a deliberate visual hierarchy. Flat, soft diffused lighting with minimal shadows. Neutral warm-white background. Colour palette: deep forest green (headlines), sage/khaki packaging neutrals, bright lime-green packaging accent, muted grey for competitor. Clinical, clean, trustworthy mood. Slight vertical portrait format.

textZones.typographyStyle: bold serif or heavy sans-serif, dark forest green, large, centered, no background
textZones.purpose: Pattern interrupt headline that calls out a problem the target audience has — creates immediate emotional tension and curiosity

textZones.typographyStyle: regular weight sans-serif, dark charcoal/near-black, medium size, centered, no background
textZones.approximateContent: Most powders hide fillers and additives you cannot pronounce. ECO does not.
textZones.purpose: Expands on the problem-solution angle, differentiates the brand from competitors and builds credibility

textZones.typographyStyle: medium weight sans-serif, white text on rounded pill/capsule button, solid sage-green background
textZones.purpose: Drives click-through by appealing to curiosity about ingredient transparency

contentRequirements.headline: Short provocative problem-statement headline, 4-7 words, bold, dark green, calls out a negative behaviour or industry problem. Starts with an imperative verb.
contentRequirements.subheadline: 2-sentence supporting copy: sentence 1 states the industry problem, sentence 2 positions the brand as the clean alternative. ~20-30 words total, centered, regular weight.
contentRequirements.cta: Short curiosity-driven CTA on a rounded pill button, 4-7 words, white text on green pill background. Placed at bottom-center.
contentRequirements.other: Visual comparison element required: hero product sharp in foreground, competitor product blurred/greyed-out in background. This visual metaphor reinforces the negative marketing angle without text.

templateAnalysis.angleReason: The template is built entirely around exposing an industry-wide problem (dirty, filler-laden protein) and presenting the advertised product as the clean, transparent solution — a textbook problem-solution structure.

concept.primary_text: Organica Tulsi Green Tea is dietitian-approved for calm, focused energy — without the crash.
concept.visual_description: The Organica Tulsi Green Tea product is centered and sharp in the lower half of the frame, resting on softly draped natural linen fabric against a warm cream background. prompts.claude:
Facebook/Instagram ad, editorial photography style.

Vertical 4:5 format. Clean premium editorial product photography on a warm cream seamless background, hex approximately #EDE9E2, completely smooth and uncluttered across the upper third of the frame — that zone holds no objects, no props, no product, transitioning from a slightly deeper warm shadow at the very top edge down to a soft even cream tone at mid-frame, creating a naturally high-contrast upper band where white text would read crisply against the muted warm tone.

The Organica Tulsi Green Tea product — a compact tea box or pouch with natural green and earthy branding — is positioned dead-center in the horizontal axis, sitting upright and forward-facing in the center vertical band of the frame, beginning at approximately 35% from the top and ending no lower than 76% from the top, leaving the lower 24% of the frame completely clear of packaging. Product rests directly on a loosely draped natural linen fabric surface — unbleached, matte, fine-woven texture with soft organic folds cascading from beneath the product, catching the gentle directional light in shallow raised ridges. The linen surface occupies the lower third of the composition as a natural platform, its warm ivory-beige tones harmonizing with the seamless background behind.

To the left of the product, a small organic cluster of dried botanical branches — fine-stemmed dried tulsi herb sprigs with tiny dark seed pods and pale sage-toned dried leaves — arranged loosely in a natural low grouping, not symmetric, extending softly into the mid-left of the frame. A few individual dried leaves rest flat on the linen surface beside the cluster, slightly overlapping the fabric folds. To the right of the product, a neatly hand-rolled cylinder of unbleached linen fabric sits horizontally, slightly elevated, its raw frayed edge visible at one end, casting a subtle soft shadow across the draped surface beneath it.

Camera positioned straight-on at a slight downward eye-level angle, lens roughly equivalent to 85mm, shallow depth of field with the product tack-sharp from label edge to edge — every typographic element, every graphic detail on the packaging in crisp focus — while the botanical props and linen roll fall into a very gentle soft-focus bloom at the outer edges, never blurring enough to lose material texture.

Lighting is soft, fully diffused, emanating from upper-left at approximately 40 degrees, casting quiet graduated shadows that fall gently to the lower-right behind the product and across the linen folds. The light creates delicate specular warmth on the product's surface without any harsh highlight clipping. The botanical sprigs catch micro rim-light on their fine dried stems. The linen fabric shows subtle woven texture through soft shadow modeling. Upper-left of background is marginally shadowed — warm-toned, not dark — creating the natural contrast zone for text overlay without any artificial darkening. No artificial vignette. No fill flash. No colored gels. The entire frame breathes in soft warm cream, muted sage green, pale wheat, and dried-herb beige.

Mood is calm authority — measured, trustworthy, precise in its restraint. The product is unmistakably the hero: centered, sharp, lit with intentional clarity against the organic softness surrounding it. Premium wellness editorial meets apothecary stillness. Zero humans. Zero food. Zero props beyond described botanicals and linen. Zero text, zero cards, zero UI elements, zero arrows, zero overlays painted into the image.

Photorealistic. Ultra high resolution.

Facebook/Instagram ad, editorial photography style.

A single Organica chamomile tea pouch stands centered and perfectly upright on a dark weathered wooden surface, occupying only the central vertical band of the frame — the product base rests at approximately 76% from the top of the frame and the top of the packaging clears the upper 32% zone completely, leaving the upper portion of the frame unobstructed and open. The bottom 24% of the frame is entirely clear of the product, showing only the dark wooden surface receding softly into shadow.

The product faces a slight three-quarter angle toward camera, label forward and tack-sharp, every printed detail on the packaging rendered with crisp commercial precision. The packaging is white with a clean botanical label, standing as the single undeniable hero of the frame.

Background: a deep forest green gradient — nearly black at all four corners, transitioning to a rich dark botanical green toward the center behind the product, creating a natural vignette that focuses all visual weight inward. The gradient feels atmospheric and premium, reminiscent of a dense herb garden at dusk, never garish, always controlled.

Fine pale chamomile-gold and soft warm cream powder or botanical mist billows gently around the base of the pouch, curling upward in slow organic tendrils no higher than one-third of the product height. The mist is slightly motion-blurred and diffuse — soft, wispy, tactile — contrasting against the tack-sharp packaging. Fine particles catch the key light and scatter warm highlights into the green atmosphere. The wooden surface beneath shows fine dark grain texture, slightly dusty, grounding the scene in natural material authenticity.

Lighting: a single dramatic overhead-left studio key light — hard-edged but controlled — strikes the front face of the packaging with a clean bright highlight that carves across the label with crisp commercial precision. A subtle fill from camera-right lifts the shadow side just enough to retain label readability without flattening the dramatic directionality. The wooden surface catches a narrow streak of the key light near the product base, then falls off quickly into rich shadow. No ambient fill, no lifestyle warmth — this is precise, authoritative studio control. The mist cloud glows faintly where the key light grazes it, adding luminous botanical depth.

The left side of the frame and right side of the frame maintain generous open negative space — the deep green background with no props, no objects, no distractions — clean enough for overlaid callout elements. The top zone above the product is a dark, near-black deep green gradient offering maximum contrast for white headline text. The bottom zone is a shadowed dark wooden surface, completely uncluttered.

Color palette: deep forest green to near-black background, white product packaging with precise label detail, warm chamomile-gold and pale cream mist cloud, dark weathered oak wood surface. No humans, no lifestyle props, no extraneous objects. Mood is calm, botanical, authoritative — a product that commands the frame through stillness and precision rather than noise. Cinematic atmospheric depth, immersive green darkness, single-source dramatic studio lighting, premium health brand commercial photography. Photorealistic. Ultra high resolution.

contentRequirements.headline: Short, dramatic 4–6 word statement written in third person narrative style (e.g. 'She read every label.'). Bold, large, dark green. Creates curiosity and identification.
contentRequirements.body: 2–3 short punchy sentences in medium weight. One framing sentence naming the brand + outcome. Then 2–3 highlighted benefit phrases (3–5 words each) with green pill highlights. Approx 20–30 words total.

contentRequirements.testimonial: Third-person paraphrase style (not a direct quote in quotation marks). Conversational, benefit-focused, 2–3 lines. Attribution line: 'Verified [Brand] customer' in small muted gray text.
contentRequirements.other: Product image (standing pouch or package) placed at bottom-right overlapping card edge — partially cropped by frame. Creates product visibility without cluttering the testimonial message.

prompts.claude:
Facebook/Instagram ad, editorial photography style.

Flat digital graphic design layout rendered as a clean wellness brand advertising frame. Soft pale sage green solid background fills the entire canvas edge to edge, flat and even, no gradients, no texture, no grain — pure solid sage (#C8D8B0) from corner to corner. The background is completely uninterrupted: no photography, no shadows, no illustrative elements, no decorative motifs. The surface reads as a clean, calm, matte digital canvas.

The center vertical band of the composition — spanning roughly 35% to 78% from the top of the frame — holds the product hero: one Organica chamomile tea pouch standing fully upright, slightly angled at approximately 8 degrees clockwise, occupying the center-right of the canvas. The pouch is crisp, sharp, and rendered with hyperreal label detail — every typographic element, logo mark, chamomile illustration, and color block on the packaging reproduced exactly as provided. The forest green and soft cream tones of the label sit naturally against the sage green background with subtle tonal contrast. The pouch base rests on an implied flat surface aligned with the lower boundary of the center zone. No part of the pouch extends above the 32% mark from the top of the frame. No part of the pouch or its label crosses below the 76% mark from the top of the frame. The bottom 24% of the canvas is completely clear, flat sage green, entirely unoccupied.

The top 32% of the frame is flat, uninterrupted sage green — no product, no illustration, no decorative element. Clean negative space reserved.

Around the base of the pouch, two or three dried chamomile flower heads rest loosely on the flat surface — small, delicate, cream-yellow petals with pale golden centers, rendered with fine botanical detail: visible tiny florets, subtle petal curl, soft dried texture. They sit casually beside the pouch base without arrangement or symmetry, as if placed naturally. A few loose dried chamomile petals scattered near them, flat against the surface. The chamomile elements occupy only the lower-center band, never crossing into the top 32% or bottom 24% reserved zones.

Lighting is flat, even, and diffused — consistent with clean digital graphic design aesthetics. No directional shadows, no cast shadows, no dramatic highlights. The product label is fully illuminated and readable. The chamomile botanicals have the faintest implied soft ambient shading to give them gentle dimensionality without breaking the flat graphic register of the composition.

Color palette strictly: sage green #C8D8B0 background, forest green #1E4D2B accents in product label, warm cream and soft gold in chamomile flowers, charcoal and white in label typography. No additional colors introduced. No photographic elements. No human presence. No hands. No text rendered into the image. No cards. No UI elements. No star icons. No pill buttons. No arrows. No overlays of any kind.

The overall visual register is flat digital illustration meets hyperreal product rendering — a modern wellness brand frame that feels calm, trustworthy, natural, and clean. The chamomile tea pouch is the sole unmistakable hero of the composition, centered, sharp, fully branded, immediately readable within one second of viewing.

Photorealistic. Ultra high resolution.
